scoreComparison.rationale: Approved answer consumption and final QA evidence improve extraction readiness; title-template/OG/cannibalisation hardening remains outside this packet.
Local identity, NAP, hours, Dentist/LocalBusiness schema and team registry remain passing; geo/hasMap/GBP identifiers remain future enhancements.
11 clinically approved priority packets now have AI/schema flags enabled with reviewer and review interval evidence; answer foundation warnings remain non-blocking.
Conversational answer registry, question inventory, visible rendering and approval evidence now align for approved packets.
Rendering QA passes 11/11 and approved packets may be consumed; overlong answer warnings are retained for future refinement.
11 approved packets now have approved_for_voice enabled and foundation voice patterns remain present.
Schema QA passes with approved-schema answer hardening for duplicates, unsafe claims, unsupported facts, invented pricing and invented outcomes.
Named reviewer, review timestamp, review date and next review date evidence now exist for every activated packet.
11 approved packets now have chatbot flags enabled while runtimeMutation remains false; this is alignment readiness only, not runtime chatbot mutation.
Required guards and SEO QA pass or pass with known warnings; repo is ready for final launch certification audit, not certified or deployed.

materialChanges: 11 approved packets activated from approval-ledger evidence.
44 recommended consumption flags enabled for approved packets only.
Priority packet QA now accepts true approval flags only when ledger, reviewer, review date, and next review date evidence exist.
Schema QA now validates approved schema answers for duplicate ids/questions and gated unsafe claims.
